text:
Created attachment 205585
patch file

- Update 1.7.1 -> 1.7.2

Changes:
  - call Gitlab API to translate go.mod's short commit IDs and tags to the full 40-character IDs as required by bsd.sites.mk
  - add -offline flag to disable network access (and commit ID translation)

QA:
  poudriere testport: OK (112a, 120a, 120i)
